raw_consumer_statement: The vendor called XXXX committed theft and fraud by taking full payment in advance for a nearly three week long car rental. Upon my arrival at the time and place of reservation, however, they refused to give me a car or a refund in direct violation of the Terms of Service and California law, which governs the transaction. My credit card company Citibank refused to reverse the charge despite many phone calls. Citibank also only reached out to XXXX for a written explanation. Upon receiving XXXX ' explanation, Citibank or Mastercard promptly ruled the dispute in favor of XXXX without first showing me XXXX ' response or giving me an opportunity to respond. I am entitled to a full refund or credit of {$500.00}.
